privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetic Excel workbook 'nsf_grant_ledger.xlsx' with 150 transactions generated at startup using seed 42. The F&A rate is 53% (0.53), applied only to MTDC-eligible costs. Equipment, Tuition Remission, and Participant Support are excluded from MTDC calculations. The ground truth totals are: Direct Costs = $556,198.31, F&A Costs = $157,175.52. All metadata claims in task.json are accurate.
